description: Variables the agent walks the owner through on first admin chat. The agent collects answers then calls apply_template_variables to substitute them across files_to_substitute. Mark complete by overwriting this file with { completed: true, completed_at: ... }.

variables.prompt: What kind of business is this? (e.g. 'plumbing', 'dental clinic', 'photography', 'tutoring')
One-line description of what you do for customers (e.g. 'fix leaky pipes and emergency plumbing', 'general dentistry and orthodontics')
Country or city you serve (e.g. 'UAE', 'Greater Boston')
Currency code for any pricing (3 letters: AED, USD, EUR, GBP...)
Daily hours when you take appointments (e.g. '8:00 AM – 5:00 PM, Mon–Sat')
Do you visit the customer, or do they come to you? (e.g. 'we visit you', 'at our office', 'both')
Closing line in the agent's voice (e.g. 'See you soon!')
